title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Tosen
Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Those are Cuties, right? Holy crap, they're
cute! Wow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say I like like them or anything, but it could be cool to have a plush version of City.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Imagine if I put it next to one of me... I can't. It
would be too cute to handle. That'd give me life.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm no good with this kind of thing. Yeah... I
better not. Once I'm hooked, I can say goodbye
to my spending money, and there's some lipstick I
wanna buy this month.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, yet Tosen Jordan's eyes keep
flicking toward the machine. I have a feeling she
won't be able to hold back, so...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real? No offense, but you don't seem like
you'd be any good at it. But, meh, if you insist.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'm gonna take a vid. Don't embarrass
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
